user.title: Daikin AC (ACM)
user.description: Scan your network for Daikin adapters or set up a new one.

data.action: What do you want to do?

discovered.title: Found Daikin adapters
discovered.description: Select the adapter you want to add. Adapters marked with !!! have dangerous firmware.

confirm.title: Add {name}

no_devices.title: No adapters found
no_devices.description:
No Daikin adapters were found on your network.

If you have a new adapter with a blinking LED, it's in AP mode and needs WiFi setup first.

ap_setup.title: New adapter setup (AP mode)
ap_setup.description:
Connect your phone/computer to the adapter's WiFi (DaikinAPxxxxx), then fill in the details below.

1. AP Host: usually 192.168.127.1
2. KEY: 13-digit code from the sticker on the adapter
3. Your home WiFi SSID and password

The adapter will reboot and join your network. Then re-run the scan to add it.

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Enter the IP address of your Daikin adapter.

abort.all_configured: All discovered adapters are already configured.
abort.ap_setup_complete: WiFi credentials sent! The adapter is rebooting and will join your network. Wait 30 seconds, then add the integration again to find it on your network.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid KEY. Check the 13-digit code on the sticker on your WiFi adapter.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Make sure you are connected to the adapter's WiFi (DaikinAPxxxxx) or the adapter is on your network.
error.no_devices_found: No Daikin adapters found on the network.
